case_title: FRANKIE CHAU et al VS. KAN WANG

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CHAU, FRANKIE LIU, RICKY AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, KAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, WHO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. MANDARIN INTERPRTER BANNIE CHOW PRESENT ON DEFENDANTS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAU, FRANKIE LIU, RICKY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WANG, KAN $6,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,685.00, PROPERT DAMAGE IS $1410.00. BODILY INJURY CLAIMS ARE $2595.00 EACH PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CHAU, FRANKIE LIU, RICKY RECOVER FROM APPELLANT WANG, KAN $3,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,885.00, $1140.00 REPRESENTS PROPERTY DAMAGE. DEFENDANT WAS 2/3 RESPONSIBLE FOR ACCIDENT, AND HER PROPORTIONATE SHARE OF EACH PLAINTIFF'S NON ECONOMIC DAMAGES IS $1330. EACH. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-06-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:53am
Judge Pro Tem Elliot Myles, clerk - Leslie Gomez - clerk, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Kan Wang is present and appears through attorney Vadim Nebuchim; interpreter Anna Peters is also present. Respondents, Frankie Chau & Ricky Liu appear in pro per. Parties testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHR (A) Medical records of Ricky Liu
EXHR (B) Medical records of Frankie Chau
EXHA (1) Repair Estimate
EXHA (2) Photos (copies)

10:16

Evidence is retained, matter is taken under submission.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
